name: YieldSentinel
validation_notes: Conditional GO — High defensibility (proprietary risk model + historical data), excellent market timing (post-Celsius/post-FTX institutional demand), technical feasibility strong (3-week MVP). Recommend launching Month 3-4 after LegacyVault to share infrastructure. Credibility-dependent: success factors include accurate collapse prediction backtesting and institutional feature maturity.
notes: Moody's for DeFi — real-time credit ratings for every crypto yield product. Continuous on-chain monitoring of collateral ratios, reserve audits, whale movements. Proprietary risk scoring (0-100 Sentinel Score). Alerts before Celsius-type collapses. Institutional play at $499/mo. Moat: proprietary risk model + no exchange will rate competitors. Priority: HIGH.
